settings_categories_delete_items: Select items to delete. Doing so will also delete the purchase history of those items.

settings_items_change_category: Select a category to move all selected items to it:

settings_users_username_invalid: Invalid name. Must have a length of {min} to {max} and contain no special characters.
shopping_add_items_explanation:
Write one type of item per line.
You may optionally add an amount before the item.
For example:
3x Tomatoes
Chocolate
2x Milk
shopping_add_items_parse_error: Some lines could not be parsed. Please check for mistakes.

shopping_categorize_select_items_invalid: Please select at least one item to categorize
shopping_validate_all_items: For reference, these are the items you wrote down in the last step:
shopping_validate_explanation: You've entered names that are very similar to existing items. When you continue, they names will be 'fixed' automatically. If you don't want this, please tick the corresponding checkbox.
